docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-22-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARICAR BOSCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANIELLE BROWN, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MARICAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $4000 FOR LOST USE OF THE APARTMENT, FOOD EXPENSE WHILE UNABLE TO USE THE APARTMENT, REIMBURSEMENT FOR OTHER APARTMENT EXPENSES PAID WHILE APARTMENT WAS UNUSABLE AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES, PLUS $75 IN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BOSCH, MARICAR AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN); [AGENT FOR SERVICE - MELINDA PEDERSEN] SERVED MAY-18-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MARICAR AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY BOSCH, MARICAR SEQUOIA EQUITIES,INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF MARICAR BOSCH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MAHESH KUMAR. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE BROWN, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
